# foreign-keys

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: FK relationships section (outgoing and incoming) in the table detail view.
- Contributes:
  - `TableDetail.Section` "foreign-keys" → `ForeignKeysSection`
- Server:
  - Uses: `database.db`
  - `GET /api/catalog/tables/:tableName/foreign-keys`
- Endpoint callers: `columns`, `indexes`, `row-count`, `sample-rows`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
